name: Granola Bars
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2 Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.
3 In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, corn syrup, melted margarine, peanut butter, and vanilla extract. Stir well until smooth.
4 Add quick oats, sunflower seeds, coconut, wheat germ, raisins, and carob chips to the mixture. Mix thoroughly.
5 Press the mixture into the prepared baking dish using your fingers or a spatula.
6 Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool completely before cutting into bars.
This recipe yields one batch of granola bars.
